scripts.build: nwbuild --platforms win32,win64,osx64 --winIco=/home/user/workspace-new/btc-monitor-widget/src/assets/logo.ico --flavor=normal --appName 'Bitcoin Monitor Widget' --buildDir dist/ src/ && cd /home/user/workspace-new/btc-monitor-widget/dist/'Bitcoin Monitor Widget' && rm *.sha256sum || true && ./compress.sh
scripts.build-linux: nwbuild --platforms linux32,linux64 --flavor=normal --appName 'Bitcoin Monitor Widget' --buildDir dist/ src/ && cd /home/user/workspace-new/btc-monitor-widget/dist/'Bitcoin Monitor Widget' && ./compress-linux.sh
scripts.build-all: npm run build && npm run build-linux
